generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "measuring hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "measuring wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "crane state data including swing angle and wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData, WindSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance TrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "trajectory paths generated for movement planning"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance ValidationMetricsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "metrics from continuous validation comparing real-time measurements with simulations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "kinematic model for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibPython
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "simulation model for crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibPython
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of crane structure created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "containerization for system components"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, CraneSimulationService, ValidationService, LoggingService, VisualizationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "time-series data storage for crane state and metrics"
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "visualization dashboard for real-time system status"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingService
]

instance GantrylibPython : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for gantry crane control and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, CraneSimulationService, ValidationService
]

instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "microcontroller for sensor control and hardware interaction"
]

instance Fusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling for physical crane structure"
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering tool for system design"
    DTDFVocab:enables ValidationService
]

instance GitHub : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "repository hosting for system code and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, CraneSimulationService, ValidationService, LoggingService, VisualizationService
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "optimal trajectory generation using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance CraneSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "simulation of crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultsInsight
]

instance ValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "continuous validation comparing real-time measurements with simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemFaultNotificationInsight
]

instance LoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "historical data logging in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataLoggingInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "visualization via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStatusVisualizationInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "optimal trajectory generation for movement planning"
]

instance SystemFaultNotificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "notifications for system faults when validation thresholds are breached"
]

instance SystemStatusVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "real-time system status visualization for operational decisions"
]

instance SimulationResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "simulation results used for validation comparisons"
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "historical data logging for system analysis"
]

instance MoveCartAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "move cart to specified position"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HoistAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "hoist movement for lifting containers"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActivateElectromagnetAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "activate electromagnet to pick up containers"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "stepper motor for cart movement"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "stepper motor for hoisting"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "electromagnet at hoist end for picking up containers"
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "physical structure of the gantry crane system"
]

instance PowerSupplyUnit : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "power supply unit for the system"
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by Antwerp harbor cranes"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment CraneEnvironment
]

instance CraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CraneFrame, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, Arduino, PowerSupplyUnit
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and Control Application are sent via the Physical Crane Interface to the motor controllers and electromagnet, enabling movement and container handling."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization for data logging and validation services, with no specific time intervals specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system where physical crane components interact with Python services (gantrylib), Dockerized database (TimescaleDB), MQTT broker (Eclipse Mosquitto), and Grafana dashboard; all deployed on a single personal computer."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers as-designed phase (CAD models in Fusion360, Capella-based Model-Based Systems Engineering) and as-operated phase (real-time data logging, validation during operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares real-time trajectory measurements with simulated trajectories, calculating distance metrics against predefined thresholds to ensure model fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; physical interface uses unspecified protocols for controller communication, with Arduino handling sensor data acquisition."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a personal computer using Docker containers for TimescaleDB, Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker, and Grafana dashboard; Python module gantrylib for other services installed via pip."
]
